edit_permissions.desc: Can edit privacy settings and permissions of this asset, such as making it public or private.
edit_permissions.label: Edit Permissions/Privacy

operator.desc: Can edit asset title, edit its renditions, or substitute source file
operator.label: Manage

owner.desc: Full control over this collection, its descendant collections and assets
owner.label: Owner

assets_operator.desc: Can manage assets (Title, source files, renditions, copy by reference), but cannot change permissions or share assets.
assets_operator.label: Manage Assets

assets_owner.desc: Full control over assets in the collection, except Permissions / Privacy.
assets_owner.label: Owner of Assets

create.desc: Can create child collections within this collection. New child will inherit same permissions as parent collection.
create.label: Create Collections

create_assets.desc: Can create assets in the collection and child collection
create_assets.label: Create Assets

delete.desc: Can delete this collection, child collections and their assets.
delete.label: Delete

delete_assets.desc: Can delete assets within the collection and child collections.
delete_assets.label: Delete Assets

edit.desc: Can manage this collection, but cannot edit assets within the collection.
edit.label: Manage Collection

edit_assets.desc: Can edit assets attributes in the collection and child collections.
edit_assets.label: Edit Assets Attributes

edit_permissions.desc: Can edit permissions/privacy of collections and assets owned by user.
edit_permissions.label: Manage permissions of owned content

owner.desc: Full control over this collection, child collections, but cannot edit permissions or privacy settings.
owner.label: Owner

share_assets.desc: Can share assets of the collection and child collections.
share_assets.label: Share Assets

view.desc: Can view this collection, its sub collections and their assets
view.label: View

view_assets.desc: Can view assets of this collection and child collections but not the collections to which they belong.
view_assets.label: View Assets

child_edit.desc: Can interact with integration, such as running it or using it in a workflow, but cannot edit its configuration or delete it.
child_edit.label: Interact

child_view.desc: View integration and read its data, but cannot interact with it. This permission is useful for users who need to see the results of an integration, but should not be able to run it or edit its configuration.
child_view.label: Use

view.desc: View integration, but cannot interact with it or see its data. This permission is useful for users who need to know an integration exists, but should not be able to run it or see its results.
view.label: View

assets_operator.desc: Can edit assets (Title, Tags, move, replace source files; view asset versions, edit renditions) at the root level of this workspace, but cannot change permissions and privacy or share assets.
assets_operator.label: Manage Assets

assets_owner.desc: Full control over the assets of this workspace
assets_owner.label: Owner of Assets

create.desc: Can create collections within this workspace, but cannot edit or delete collections created by others.
create.label: Create Collections

create_assets.desc: Can create assets at the root level of this workspace.
create_assets.label: Create Assets

delete.desc: Can delete this workspace (Not implemented in GUI).
delete.label: Delete

delete_assets.desc: Can delete assets at the root level of this workspace, but cannot edit assets or change permissions.
delete_assets.label: Delete Assets

edit.desc: Can manage this workspace (change title, add locales, tags, entities, renditions, attributes) but cannot edit assets within the workspace.
edit.label: Manage

edit_assets.desc: Can edit attributes of assets at the root level of this workspace.
edit_assets.label: Edit Assets Attributes

edit_permissions.desc: Can edit permissions/privacy of collections and assets owned by user
edit_permissions.label: Edit Permissions

owner.desc: Full control over the workspace, its collections and assets.
owner.label: Owner

share_assets.desc: Can share assets at the root level of this workspace.
share_assets.label: Share Assets

view.desc: Minimal permission a user must  have to access Workspace. Otherwise, you can mark this workspace as public.
view.label: Can Access

view_assets.desc: Can view all assets in the workspace, but cannot see the collections they belong to.
view_assets.label: View Assets
